description_long: This is a wooden canoe with a classic, elongated hull shape and a slightly curved bottom, designed for stability and efficient movement through water. The canoe features a ribbed interior structure with visible planks and crosswise supports, providing both strength and seating areas. The gunwales run along the top edges, reinforcing the sides and adding to the traditional appearance. The ends of the canoe are squared off, and there are no visible paddles, oarlocks, or decorative elements. The wood grain is prominent, giving the canoe a warm, natural brown color and a slightly glossy finish. The interior is open and spacious, suitable for seating multiple occupants or carrying cargo.
description: A traditional wooden canoe with ribbed interior, crosswise supports, and a warm brown finish. The open hull and visible wood grain highlight its classic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the canoe, highlighting the ribbed interior and squared ends.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying the open hull, seating areas, and crosswise supports.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the length and interior ribbing.
description_view_3: End view showing the width, interior seating, and the structure of the hull.
